settings.heading: Built for pet homes where shedding never stops.
settings.text: FurQuiet exists to make routine grooming calmer for pets and cleaner for small homes.
Calmer brushing, less loose fur, clearer proof.

FurQuiet is built around a simple owner problem: heavy-shedding dogs and long-hair cats can turn normal brushing into a full-room cleanup. The first product is a quiet-start grooming vacuum kit designed to introduce sound gradually, collect loose fur visibly, and help owners reset the room faster.

settings.heading: We sell proof pet owners can see.
settings.text: The product story is not vague wellness language. It is the brush pass, the calm pet signal, the fur cup reveal, and the cleaner sofa after grooming. Every guide, product image, and short video should support that same promise.

settings.heading: Built around the questions pet owners already search

settings.text: The fur cup reveal has to be visible before this product earns a serious buying claim.
